Author: bdg
Name: Hook Namer
Punchline: Makes your AutoHook presets usable by GatherBuddy Reborn.
Description: GatherBuddy Reborn can reuse your own AutoHook presets instead of generating its own, but only if a preset is named exactly the target fish's item ID (it compares the whole name, so "4948 Glimmerscale" will not match - it has to be "4948"). Community presets never follow that convention. Hook Namer reads your AutoHook presets, works out which fish each one targets, and creates an ID-named duplicate through AutoHook's import API, filed into a 'HookNamer' folder in AutoHook's preset list to keep things tidy - your originals are left untouched. Presets that target several fish, or none, are listed so you can pick the target yourself. Open with /hooknamer.
